summary: Iteration 139: Spa Services, Spa Booking, Pamphlet Designer + Cake Order Reminder - All 29 backend tests passed. Tested 7 spa-services endpoints (list with auto-seed, active_only filter, create, update, toggle-active, delete, pos/sync-queue), 7 spa-booking endpoints (public services, QR SVG, QR meta with PNG, book, bookings list with filters, status update), 10 pamphlet endpoints (create, auto-generate, list, get, update, export-pdf, assets/upload, assets list, assets/raw, unsupported type rejection), and cake-order reminder regression.

verified_features.SPA_SERVICES_list_auto_seeds: PASS - GET /api/spa-services/ auto-seeds 7 services on first call, each with SKU format SPA-{6-char-base}-{4-char-hex}
verified_features.SPA_SERVICES_active_only_filter: PASS - GET /api/spa-services/?active_only=true filters to active services only
verified_features.SPA_SERVICES_create_enqueues_pos: PASS - POST /api/spa-services/ creates service and enqueues 'create' action to pos_outbound with kind='spa_service'
verified_features.SPA_SERVICES_update_enqueues_pos: PASS - PATCH /api/spa-services/{id} updates service and enqueues 'update' action
verified_features.SPA_SERVICES_toggle_active: PASS - POST /api/spa-services/{id}/toggle-active flips active flag and enqueues 'activate' or 'deactivate'
verified_features.SPA_SERVICES_delete_enqueues_deactivate: PASS - DELETE /api/spa-services/{id} removes service and enqueues 'deactivate' action
verified_features.SPA_SERVICES_pos_sync_queue_kind_filter: PASS - GET /api/spa-services/pos/sync-queue returns only kind='spa_service' pending items
verified_features.SPA_BOOKING_public_services: PASS - GET /api/spa-booking/services/{hotel-slug} returns only active services, excludes therapists/rooms/tax_code
verified_features.SPA_BOOKING_qr_svg: PASS - GET /api/spa-booking/qr/{hotel-slug} returns SVG with media_type=image/svg+xml, contains <svg tag, X-Booking-URL header
verified_features.SPA_BOOKING_qr_meta: PASS - GET /api/spa-booking/qr/{hotel-slug}/meta returns {url, png_base64, hotel_slug}, PNG decodes correctly with valid magic bytes
verified_features.SPA_BOOKING_create_booking: PASS - POST /api/spa-booking/book creates booking with unique confirmation_code (SPA-XXXXXX format), status='requested'
verified_features.SPA_BOOKING_enqueues_pos: PASS - Booking creation enqueues kind='spa_booking' to pos_outbound collection
verified_features.SPA_BOOKING_list_with_filters: PASS - GET /api/spa-booking/bookings lists bookings, filter by hotel_slug and status works
verified_features.SPA_BOOKING_status_update: PASS - POST /api/spa-booking/bookings/{id}/status changes status, invalid status returns 400
verified_features.PAMPHLET_create: PASS - POST /api/pamphlet/ creates pamphlet doc with pmp- prefix ID
verified_features.PAMPHLET_auto_generate: PASS - POST /api/pamphlet/auto-generate builds pamphlet from active services with spa_service_card elements, at least 1 page with >=1 element
verified_features.PAMPHLET_list: PASS - GET /api/pamphlet/ lists pamphlets, no _id leak
verified_features.PAMPHLET_export_pdf: PASS - GET /api/pamphlet/{id}/export-pdf returns valid PDF (media_type=application/pdf, starts with %PDF-)
verified_features.PAMPHLET_asset_upload_png: PASS - POST /api/pamphlet/assets/upload with PNG file succeeds, returns asset id + metadata
verified_features.PAMPHLET_asset_list: PASS - GET /api/pamphlet/assets lists uploaded assets, excludes path field
verified_features.PAMPHLET_asset_raw: PASS - GET /api/pamphlet/assets/{id}/raw returns file bytes with correct media type (image/png)
verified_features.PAMPHLET_unsupported_type_400: PASS - Unsupported file type (.exe) upload returns 400
verified_features.CAKE_ORDER_reminder_id: PASS - POST /api/cake-orders/ creates reminder in pastry_production_reminders, response contains reminder_id (sched- prefix)
verified_features.CAKE_ORDER_production_summary_increases: PASS - After cake order creation, GET /api/production-schedules/summary total_open increases

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed spa services, bookings, pamphlets, and cake orders for testing. Spa services auto-seed 7 services on first GET call.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spa Operations module fully functional: (1) Spa Services CRUD with auto-POS sync - every create/update/toggle/delete enqueues to pos_outbound with kind='spa_service'. Auto-seeds 7 services on first GET. SKU format: SPA-{6-char-base}-{4-char-hex}. (2) Spa Booking - public catalog excludes private fields (therapists/rooms/tax_code), QR code endpoints return valid SVG and PNG, booking creates confirmation_code (SPA-XXXXXX) and enqueues kind='spa_booking' to POS. (3) Pamphlet Designer - CRUD, auto-generate from active services creates spa_service_card elements, PDF export produces valid PDF with bleed + crop marks, asset upload supports PDF/SVG/PNG/JPG/WebP/PSD/AI, rejects unsupported types with 400. (4) Cake order now creates dashboard reminder (reminder_id in response). All responses exclude _id. Collections: spa_services, spa_bookings, pamphlets, pamphlet_assets, pos_outbound.
